message: I should speak to Ms. White again.

Hello, Ms. White,

Since we last met, I have spoken to Dr. Kevin. Also, I attended an open house today to get more information about postsecondary education. I feel like I have a better understanding of what I need to do to be prepared. I think I’m ready to submit an application. Can you help me with that?

Sincerely,

%player%

actions.item: Complete Budgeting Activity in Ms. White's Email
